items.title: I love late goals like Neymar’s because they make everything that happened previously so much more consequential. Suddenly Haaland’s second goal is the game-winner instead of just insurance, and Bruno G’s saved PK is an even more unmitigated disaster.
items.author: Tom Westerholm
items.body_excerpt: I love late goals like Neymar’s because they make everything that happened previously so much more consequential. Suddenly Haaland’s second goal is the game-winner instead of just insurance, and Bruno G’s saved PK is an even more unmitigated disaster.

items.title: Fever begin a four-game trip out west tonight in Las Vegas. It’s their first game since June 27, enjoying an extended break.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Fever begin a four-game trip out west tonight in Las Vegas. It’s their first game since June 27, enjoying an extended break.

Caitlin Clark is missing her second straight game, and A’ja Wilson (right leg) is out as well.

It’s at 7pm ET on ESPN/Disney+
